description:
Add Playwright coverage around the patient billing path and the launch invariant that Stripe cannot charge before clinical approval.

**Scope**
- Test payment-method or checkout entry points before and after the selected MDI billing unlock event.
- Assert no charge, active subscription, or billing activation path is reachable before clinical approval/unlock.
- Cover approved, declined, abandoned, cancellation, dunning, and refund-support branches at the browser level with mocked Stripe and webhook state.
- Assert Stripe-facing request/metadata fixtures contain only opaque non-PHI identifiers and no condition, medication, diagnosis, symptom, questionnaire answer, clinician note, or health context.

**Acceptance**
- Browser tests fail if payment UI or API calls can create a charge/subscription before the clinical unlock event.
- Clinically declined and abandoned flows leave billing inactive and route users to safe support/refund messaging.
- Metadata assertions enforce the project Stripe data policy with synthetic fixture payloads.
- Local E2E uses mocked Stripe seams; any staging smoke path uses Stripe test mode only.
title: Stripe billing timing and no-PHI metadata E2E specs
